title: LDAP Injection
description: DirCorp interpolates your username and password directly into an LDAP filter template. Fuse extra clauses to match admin without knowing the admin password.

hints.text: The template is (&(uid={USER})(password={PASS})). Close the uid clause, inject a new one, neutralise the password clause with a wildcard.
username = *)(uid=admin    password = *   The resulting filter (&(uid=*)(uid=admin)(password=*)) matches admin and demands no real password.
